title: sideritis erythrantha subsp. cedretorum
intro: Sideritis erythrantha subsp. cedretorum, also known as Cedret Sideritis or Sideritis cedretorum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Sideritis erythrantha subsp. cedretorum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
